title: lasiagrostis calamagrostis
intro: Lasiagrostis calamagrostis, also known as feather grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lasiagrostis calamagrostis include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and aiding in the healing of wounds. Herbal preparations of Lasiagrostis calamagrostis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
